description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 49 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His activity was mainly in Java and Markdown, with some time in other languages. The data shows work across 4 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
